detectors.description:
Reentrancy in $oldman._transfer(address,address,uint256) ($oldman.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) ($oldman.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) ($oldman.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) ($oldman.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) ($oldman.sol#823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) ($oldman.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) ($oldman.sol#949)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) ($oldman.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) ($oldman.sol#931)
	$oldman._rOwned ($oldman.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- $oldman._takeTeam(uint256) ($oldman.sol#943-951)
	- $oldman._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) ($oldman.sol#903-939)
	- $oldman.balanceOf(address) ($oldman.sol#491-495)
	- $oldman.constructor() ($oldman.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) ($oldman.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) ($oldman.sol#957)
	$oldman._rTotal ($oldman.sol#353) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- $oldman._getCurrentSupply() ($oldman.sol#1099-1109)
	- $oldman._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) ($oldman.sol#955-961)
	- $oldman.constructor() ($oldman.sol#425-455)
	- $oldman.tokenFromReflection(uint256) ($oldman.sol#587-609)
